creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, version 2014 is available about two months ago:
ftp://tug.org/historic/systems/texlive/2014/

There wasn't any reaction for my report so I thought this is not needed. For me the 2013 works well, so I didn't hurry to update to 2014.
And asked on the freebsd-tex mailing list ( http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-tex/2014-March/000012.html ) too.
